code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut tokens: List<Int> = []
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if not string.is_empty(cur)
        match string.parse_int(cur)
        when Some(v)
          tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
        when None
          ()
        end
        cur = ""
      end
    else
      cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(cur)
  match string.parse_int(cur)
  when Some(v)
    tokens = list.push(tokens, v)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut a = 0
mut b_end = 0
mut s = 1
match tokens.get(0)
when Some(v)
  a = v
when None
  ()
end
match tokens.get(1)
when Some(v)
  b_end = v
when None
  ()
end
match tokens.get(2)
when Some(v)
  s = v
when None
  ()
end

mut out = ""
mut x = a
mut first = true
while x < b_end
  if first
    out = "#{x}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{x}"
  end
  x = x + s
end
println(out)
